headerDisplay: Full-featured control of Hyperion / Hyperion.NG. This form edits a classic `"accessory": "Hyperion"` block, so it is drop-in compatible with existing installs. For multi-instance auto-discovery, use the `HyperionV2` platform (see README).
footerDisplay: For help and the full options list, see the [project README](https://github.com/phbuilds/homebridge-hyperion-v2).

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name of the main light in HomeKit.

host.title: Host / IP
host.description: IP or hostname of your Hyperion server. Use a static IP / DHCP reservation. (The legacy key 'url' is also accepted.)

port.title: Port
port.description: 19444 = Hyperion JSON TCP socket (classic default). 8090 = Hyperion.NG web server (HTTP).

token.title: API Token
token.description: Only needed if your Hyperion has API authentication enabled. Generate it in Hyperion under Network -> Token Management.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Hyperion priority used for color/effect commands. Lower number = higher priority.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to re-read Hyperion state so HomeKit reflects external changes. Set 0 to disable polling (TCP still gets live push updates).

effects.title: Effects
effects.description: Leave EMPTY to auto-discover effects from your Hyperion/HyperHDR server (recommended). Add names here only to override with a custom subset (exact names from the Hyperion web UI).

origin.title: Origin Label
origin.description: Shown in Hyperion's priority list as the source of commands.

powerComponent.title: Power Switch Controls
powerComponent.description: Which Hyperion component the main on/off switch toggles. The plugin also stops the LED device on Off so WLED and similar devices actually go dark.

verboseLog.title: Verbose logging
verboseLog.description: Log every command sent to Hyperion and its result to the main log. Useful for troubleshooting; turn off for normal use.

ambilightClearsEffect.title: Ambilight returns to capture
ambilightClearsEffect.description: When you turn on Ambilight/USB capture, clear the plugin's running effect/color so the live capture feed becomes visible again (recommended).

autoPowerOnAction.title: Auto power-on actions
autoPowerOnAction.description: Turn the LEDs on automatically when you pick an effect, set a color, or enable capture, so the result is never invisible (recommended).

ambilightMode.title: Ambilight Switch Mode

oneOf.title: LED device — switch enables/disables the LED device (default)
Ambient — switch disables the capture device
Capture — switch toggles the capture device

ambilightMode.description: What the Ambilight switch does. 'LED device' enables/disables the LED device only. Other modes control the capture device or picture.

maxEffects.title: Max Effects In Wheel
maxEffects.description: Size of the effects wheel when auto-discovering. Raise only if your server has more effects than this; keep the total low to stay within HomeKit limits.

hideMusicEffects.title: Hide music/audio effects
hideMusicEffects.description: When auto-discovering effects, hide HyperHDR's audio visualizers ("Music: ...") for a cleaner Hyperion.NG-style wheel.

mainMode.title: Main Light Button Mode

oneOf.title: Power — main light is master power; brightness 0% turns it off (default)
Ambient — main light toggles ambient mode (disables capture)

mainMode.description: What the main light On/Off does. 'Power' = master power, and the brightness slider at 0% turns the light off. 'Ambient' disables the capture device when on.

effectsPowerCapture.title: Effects tile power = USB capture
effectsPowerCapture.description: When on, the power button on the effects tile enables/disables the USB capture device (V4L).
